stemHtml: Which statement correctly describes the operation of a cockpit fixed oxygen system, specifically when using a diluter-demand regulator?

options.a: Above a certain cabin altitude, a diluter-demand regulator selected to NORMAL will eventually provide 100% oxygen.
options.b: A diluter-demand regulator selected to NORMAL supplies a mixture of air and oxygen sourced from a diluter air tank.
options.c: Only when descending through a certain cabin altitude, a diluter-demand regulator selected to 100% will deliver 100% oxygen.
options.d: A diluter-demand regulator decreases oxygen pressure from 1800 psi (in the cylinders), down to about 50 - 75 psi (low pressure system).
